prompt:
Premium dark mood board collage for a digital marketing agency called 'MM AGENCY.' — a single large image containing multiple visual panels arranged in an elegant asymmetric grid layout on a deep dark background (#0A0A0C). This is a visual style reference board, NOT a brand guidelines poster.

OVERALL COMPOSITION: Asymmetric grid of 8-10 panels/tiles of varying sizes arranged on a dark canvas with thin gaps between them. Some panels are large rectangles, some are small squares. The overall feel is premium, tech-forward, data-driven luxury — like the agency NoGood's visual style.

PANEL 1 (large, top-left): 3D wireframe TORUS (donut shape) floating in dark space. The wireframe is made of thin glowing yellow (#FAFA00) lines forming a mesh. Subtle yellow glow emanating from the shape. Dark background (#181818). The wireframe lines should be clearly visible as a geometric mesh, NOT a solid shape.

PANEL 2 (medium, top-center): Data visualization — a line chart with a bold upward-trending curve. The line uses a gradient from bright yellow (#FAFA00) to deep orange (#F54900). Small data points as dots along the line. Dark background with subtle grid lines. Clean, minimal, like a premium analytics dashboard.

PANEL 3 (small, top-right): Color palette strip — 6 small filled circles in a row: yellow (#FAFA00), violet (#713DFF), orange (#F54900), cyan (#00E3FF), pink (#FCA8FF), green (#008500). On dark background (#181818). Clean, minimal.

PANEL 4 (medium-tall, left): 3D wireframe CUBE rotating in dark space. Yellow (#FAFA00) wireframe lines with subtle glow. You can see through the cube — all edges visible. Dark background.

PANEL 5 (large, center): Typography specimen — the text 'DATA-DRIVEN GROWTH.' in very large, bold, blocky geometric uppercase sans-serif font (like Microgramma Extended or Eurostile Extended). White text on dark background. The period/dot at the end is bright yellow (#FAFA00). Below: smaller text 'Performance marketing for businesses ready to scale.' in a clean thin sans-serif. Premium editorial feel.

PANEL 6 (medium, right): Abstract concentric circles — target/bullseye pattern with 5 concentric circles. The circles use a gradient from yellow center to orange outer rings. Subtle glow from the center. Dark background. Like a data visualization target graphic.

PANEL 7 (small, bottom-left): Horizontal bar chart with 5 bars of different lengths. Bars use gradient from yellow (#FAFA00) to orange (#F54900). Rounded ends. Dark background. Clean data visualization style.

PANEL 8 (medium, bottom-center): 3D wireframe SPHERE — a globe-like shape made of longitude and latitude wireframe lines in yellow (#FAFA00). Rotating in dark space with subtle glow. Like a digital globe wireframe.

PANEL 9 (small, bottom-right): Network nodes — 5-6 dots connected by thin lines forming an abstract network graph. Dots are violet (#713DFF) and pink (#FCA8FF). Lines are thin and semi-transparent. Dark background.

PANEL 10 (thin strip, very bottom): The text 'MM AGENCY.' in bold uppercase geometric sans-serif, white, with yellow dot. Small. Anchoring the composition.

STYLE RULES:
- Every panel has dark background (#181818 or #202020)
- Thin 2px gaps between panels, gap color is near-black (#0A0A0C)
- NO photography, NO people, NO real objects
- All elements are vector-quality: clean lines, sharp edges, flat with subtle glow
- Color palette is strictly: yellow #FAFA00, violet #713DFF, orange #F54900, cyan #00E3FF, pink #FCA8FF, green #008500 on dark backgrounds
- The overall image looks like something from Behance or Dribbble — a premium agency mood board
- 3D wireframe shapes are the hero visual element — they should be prominent and beautifully rendered
- The data visualization graphics (charts, targets, nodes) use gradient colors and look like premium dashboard elements
- Typography is bold, geometric, uppercase, with generous letter-spacing
negative_prompt: photography, humans, faces, real objects, products, white background, light background, colorful background, gradients on background, noise, grunge, messy, cluttered, amateur, clip art, cartoon, hand drawn, sketch, watermark, blurry text, illegible text, misspelled text, soft focus, low quality, pixelated, busy patterns, floral, organic shapes, curved handwritten fonts, script fonts, 3D solid shapes, realistic rendering, photorealistic
